options.content:
## Grafo de Conhecimento (GraphRAG)
Dados sincronizados do PostgreSQL. Todas as relações entre Produtos, Materiais, Fornecedores, Equipamentos, NCRs e Sensores.

**Neo4j Browser:** [localhost:7474](http://localhost:7474) (neo4j / nexus2024) — Para visualização interativa do grafo completo.

As tabelas abaixo mostram as relações de forma estruturada.

panels.title: BOM — Produto × Material (quem usa o quê)

targets.rawSql: SELECT p.id AS "Produto ID", p.name AS "Produto", m.id AS "Material ID", m.name AS "Material", (b.elem->>'qty')::numeric AS "Qtd", b.elem->>'unit' AS "Un.", m.abc_class AS "ABC", CASE WHEN m.stock_current < m.stock_min THEN 'CRITICO' WHEN m.stock_current <= m.reorder_point THEN 'REPOR' ELSE 'OK' END AS "Status" FROM products p, jsonb_array_elements(p.bom) AS b(elem) JOIN materials m ON m.id = b.elem->>'material_id' ORDER BY p.id, m.abc_class

SELECT m.name AS "Material", m.abc_class AS "ABC", s.name AS "Fornecedor", sm.unit_price_brl AS "Preço (R$)", sm.lead_time_days AS "Lead Time", CASE WHEN sm.is_preferred THEN 'Sim' ELSE '' END AS "Pref.", s.rating AS "Rating", s.reliability_pct AS "OTIF %" FROM supplier_materials sm JOIN suppliers s ON sm.supplier_id = s.id JOIN materials m ON sm.material_id = m.id ORDER BY m.name, sm.is_preferred DESC, s.rating DESC

SELECT e.id AS "Equip. ID", e.name AS "Equipamento", e.type AS "Tipo", e.health_score AS "Health", e.oee_pct AS "OEE %", e.status AS "Status", string_agg(DISTINCT p.name, ', ') AS "Produtos" FROM equipment e LEFT JOIN production_orders po ON po.line_id = CASE WHEN e.id IN ('CNC-03','SERRA-01','RETIFICA-01') THEN 'LINHA-01' WHEN e.id = 'PRENSA-01' THEN 'LINHA-02' END LEFT JOIN products p ON po.product_id = p.id GROUP BY e.id, e.name, e.type, e.health_score, e.oee_pct, e.status ORDER BY e.health_score ASC

SELECT qr.id AS "NCR", p.name AS "Produto", qr.type AS "Tipo Defeito", qr.severity AS "Severidade", qr.root_cause AS "Causa Raiz", qr.status AS "Status" FROM quality_records qr JOIN products p ON qr.product_id = p.id WHERE qr.status NOT IN ('corrigida', 'fechada') ORDER BY CASE qr.severity WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'major' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END

panels.title: Pedidos de Compra → Fornecedor → Material (cadeia de suprimento ativa)

targets.rawSql: SELECT po.id AS "PC", s.name AS "Fornecedor", m.name AS "Material", po.quantity AS "Qtd", po.unit_price_brl AS "Preço", po.total_brl AS "Total (R$)", po.status AS "Status", po.urgency AS "Urgência", po.expected_delivery AS "Entrega" FROM purchase_orders po JOIN suppliers s ON po.supplier_id = s.id JOIN materials m ON po.material_id = m.id WHERE po.status NOT IN ('received', 'rejected') ORDER BY CASE po.urgency WHEN 'emergency' THEN 1 WHEN 'urgent' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END

panels.title: Cadeia Completa: Fornecedor → Material → Produto (mapa de dependências)

targets.rawSql: SELECT s.name AS "Fornecedor", s.rating AS "Rating", s.location AS "Local", m.name AS "Material", m.abc_class || '/' || m.xyz_class AS "ABC/XYZ", sm.unit_price_brl AS "Preço", sm.lead_time_days AS "Lead Time", p.name AS "Produto", (b.elem->>'qty')::numeric AS "Qtd/Prod", CASE WHEN m.stock_current < m.stock_min THEN 'CRITICO' WHEN m.stock_current <= m.reorder_point THEN 'REPOR' ELSE 'OK' END AS "Estoque" FROM supplier_materials sm JOIN suppliers s ON sm.supplier_id = s.id JOIN materials m ON sm.material_id = m.id LEFT JOIN products p ON TRUE LEFT JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(p.bom) AS b(elem) ON b.elem->>'material_id' = m.id WHERE b.elem IS NOT NULL ORDER BY s.name, m.name, p.name

SELECT DISTINCT ON (sr.equipment_id, sr.sensor_type) e.name AS "Equipamento", sr.sensor_type AS "Sensor", sr.value AS "Valor", sr.unit AS "Un.", sr.threshold AS "Threshold", ROUND((sr.value / NULLIF(sr.threshold, 0) * 100)::numeric, 1) AS "% Threshold", sr.status AS "Status", sr.read_at AS "Última Leitura" FROM sensor_readings sr JOIN equipment e ON sr.equipment_id = e.id ORDER BY sr.equipment_id, sr.sensor_type, sr.read_at DESC
